since_last: 37% of 100 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads +0.71%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 37% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.38% · BTC -0.96% · Gold -0.53% · Nasdaq100 -0.28%. 37% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at +0.71%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at +0.71%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -3.18%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SKHY is the standout at -7.31%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +2.11%, BIDU +1.90%, OKTA +1.75%, PUBM +1.45%, WDAY +1.28%. Laggards: SKHY -7.31%, MU -5.20%, TER -4.67%, ARM -4.52%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.50% at $134.59
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.50% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
